raw_consumer_statement:
Hi XXXX, I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to express my frustration and seek assistance regarding an issue with an order I placed with a company called SP PAMO Design on XX/XX/year>. One of the boxes from this order has not been delivered, and this situation has become increasingly frustrating due to the lack of communication and resolution from XXXX and Citibank Credit Cards. 

To provide some context, I had ordered the XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and the XXXX XXXX, but unfortunately, I have only received one box with the tracking number USPS XXXX. The missing box, with the tracking number USPS XXXX, was supposedly left at the lockers. However, the truth is that it was never delivered, and it also doesn't fit in a locker. I have attached a picture of my building lockers, and as you can see, it is impossible for the missing box to fit in it. 

Additionally, I tried to open a claim with USPS, but since the insurance was not paid for, I am unable to do so. This has added to my frustration and has left me with no other option but to seek your assistance in resolving this matter.

Thank you for your attention to this issue, and I hope to hear from you soon with a resolution.
